title: Can High Commodity Prices Drive Strong Q3 Earnings for APA?
text: While strong commodity prices and oil production are likely to have boosted APA Corporation's (APA) third-quarter results, escalation in costs might have played spoilsport.

title: Apache Corporation Tree Grant Program Announces 2022 Recipients; Marks Significant Milestone With 5 Millionth Tree Awarded
text: HOUSTON, Oct. 24, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Apache Corporation, a subsidiary of APA Corporation (Nasdaq: APA), today announced the donation of more than 245,000 trees to 40 nonprofit partner organizations through the annual Apache Corporation Tree Grant Program. Since 2005, over 5 million trees have been granted to more than 900 U.S. nonprofit charitable partners and government agencies. Plantings from this year's grants will begin this month and will continue through May 2023.

title: APA Corporation Domestic Gains Supplemented By International Activity
text: Apache Corporation, a $13.55 billion market cap US oil & gas company is making a comeback. US operations are supplemented by Suriname success and operations in the UK & Egypt. Like its peers, the company has benefited from higher gas and oil prices. Its pricing upside is not limited by hedges but it does face higher taxes in the UK.

title: Top Ranked Oil Stock Nears Buy Point On Solid Earnings, Strong Ratings
text: APA is in a cup-with-handle base and is nearing a buy point after a strong quarter and with stellar technical ratings. The post Top Ranked Oil Stock Nears Buy Point On Solid Earnings, Strong Ratings appeared first on Investor's Business Daily.

title: More Appreciation on the Horizon for These 5 U.S. Upstream Stocks
text: Notwithstanding recession-related headwinds, the Zacks Oil and Gas - US E&P operators like APA, AR, CRK, NOG and ESTE should enjoy some upside momentum for the time being.

title: Investor demand for energy stocks will soon increase ‘dramatically,' analyst says
text: Investors appear ready to starting buying energy stocks again as earnings start rolling in. They are looking to boost their weightings in the sector given healthy free-cash flows (FCF), said analyst Neal Dingmann at Truist.

title: Is APA (APA) Stock Undervalued Right Now?
text: Here at Zacks, our focus is on the proven Zacks Rank system, which emphasizes earnings estimates and estimate revisions to find great stocks. Nevertheless, we are always paying attention to the latest value, growth, and momentum trends to underscore strong picks.

title: APA Updates Q3 2022 Guidance, Expects Greater U.S. Production
text: APA expects U.S. production to be more than the higher end of the previous third-quarter guidance.

title: APA Corporation: Buckle Up For The 2022/2023 Natural Gas Withdrawal Season
text: Natural gas rallied in Q3 and was over 80% higher than the 2021 closing level. APA shares have soared, and the prospects are for higher highs.
